results.name: Login page renders
results.reasoning: The login page displays correctly with the expected split-screen design. Left panel shows dark-themed branding with 'The Sports Community Built for Athletes' headline, feature list, and statistics (12K+ active athletes, 340 live streams, 890+ coaches). Right panel contains functional sign-in form with email/password fields, Sign In button, and Create Account option. A live stream widget is visible showing 'NBA Pre-season Training Analysis' with 2.4K viewers. All elements are properly rendered with real data and the layout appears complete and functional.
